summary: A short, polished pop-culture crossover skit in which Pawn Stars' Rick Harrison stands in the White House Blue Room and delivers a riff on his signature catchphrase: 'the best I can do is the golden age for small businesses.' It is cinematically shot and capped with a stylized animated 'THE WHITE HOUSE' title card, framing administration economic messaging as an entertainment parody. The piece leans on the recognizable Pawn Stars persona/format for viral, youth-friendly appeal.

script.scene: Rick Harrison (Pawn Stars) stands arms-spread in the ornate White House Blue Room, addressing the camera.
Continuing his pitch in the Blue Room, delivering the catchphrase line 'the best I can do is the golden age for small businesses.'
Cut to black; animated letters scramble onto the screen.
Letters resolve into a stylized 'THE WHITE HOUSE' wordmark over a line-art White House.
Final 'THE WHITE HOUSE' title card with the flag detail completes the outro.

notable_text: BEST I CAN DO IS THE GOLDEN AGE FOR SMALL BUSINESSES; Pawn Stars' Rick Harrison x White House; THE WHITE HOUSE
